Nightmare Alley (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,338,107Details
International Box Office $28,291,088
Worldwide Box Office $39,629,195
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $444,493
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,030,816
Total $1,475,309
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When charismatic but down-on-his-luck Stanton Carlisle endears himself to clairvoyant Zeena and her has-been mentalist husband Pete at a traveling carnival, he crafts a golden ticket to success, using this newly acquired knowledge to grift the wealthy elite of 1940s New York society. With the virtuous Molly loyally by his side, Stanton plots to con a dangerous tycoon with the aid of a mysterious psychiatrist who might be his most formidable opponent yet.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,811,703 (24.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.03 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,145 opening theaters/2,145 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,154,398

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 17th, 2021 (Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: January 13th, 2022 (Wide) (Malaysia)
January 13th, 2022 (Wide) (Singapore)
January 19th, 2022 (Limited) (Germany)
January 19th, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
January 19th, 2022 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: March 8th, 2022 by Searchlight Pictures
MPA Rating: R for strong/bloody violence, some sexual content, nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2688 (cert #53284), 7/7/2021)
Running Time: 150 minutes
Award nomination: 2022 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Plot point: Abusive Therapists, Confidence Men, Fake Psychics, Fugitive / On the Run, Homeless, No Honor Among Thieves, Relationships Gone Wrong
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Searchlight Pictures , Double Dare You
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

When charismatic but down-on-his-luck Stanton Carlisle endears himself to clairvoyant Zeena and her has-been mentalist husband Pete at a traveling carnival, he crafts a golden ticket to success, using this newly acquired knowledge to grift the wealthy elite of 1940s New York society. With the virtuous Molly loyally by his side, Stanton plots to con a dangerous tycoon with the aid of a mysterious psychiatrist who might be his most formidable opponent yet.
